en.extract:
Prigogine's greenbul (Chlorocichla prigoginei) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae.
It is found only in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.
It is threatened by habitat loss.


Taxonomy and systematics
Prigogine's bulbul is one of five species of bulbul in the genus Chlorocichla. It was originally described as Chlorocichla prigoginei by Antoon de Roo in 1967. The generic name Chlorocichla comes from the Greek χλωρος (khlōros), meaning yellow, and κιχλη (kikhlē), meaning thrush. The specific epithet prigoginei is in honour of Alexandre Prigogine, a Russian-Belgian ornithologist. Alternate names for Prigogine's greenbul include the Butembo greenbul, Congo greenbul and Prigogine's bulbul. It is monotypic.


Conservation
The species is listed as Data Deficient by the IUCN.


References


External links
BirdLife Species Factsheet.

'''Prigogine's greenbul''' ('''''Chlorocichla prigoginei''''') is a species of [[songbird]] in the [[bulbul]] family, Pycnonotidae.
It is found only in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo.

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

== Taxonomy and systematics ==
Prigogine's bulbul is one of five species of bulbul in the genus ''[[Chlorocichla]]''. It was originally described as ''Chlorocichla prigoginei'' by [[Antoon Emeric Marcel De Roo|Antoon de Roo]] in 1967. The generic name ''Chlorocichla'' comes from the [[Greek language|Greek]] χλωρος (''khlōros''), meaning yellow, and κιχλη (''kikhlē''), meaning thrush. The [[Binomial nomenclature|specific epithet]] ''prigoginei'' is in honour of Alexandre Prigogine, a [[Russians|Russian]]-[[Belgians|Belgian]] ornithologist. Alternate names for Prigogine's greenbul include the '''Butembo greenbul''', '''Congo greenbul''' and '''Prigogine's bulbul'''. It is monotypic.<ref>{{Cite journal|last=Fishpool|first=Lincoln|last2=Tobias|first2=Joe|date=2020-03-04|title=Prigogine's Greenbul (Chlorocichla prigoginei)|url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/prigre1/cur/introduction|journal=Birds of the World|language=en}}</ref>

== Conservation ==
The species is listed as [[Data deficient|Data Deficient]] by the [[International Union for Conservation of Nature|IUCN]].
